clusters.name: Token, shortcut, and structural sizing boundaries
Layout root, scrolling, and safe-area ownership
Material, glass, depth, border, and shadow governance
Finalized runtime state and listener lifecycle

rules.title: Prefer project Pro-wrappers over raw PrimeVue
rules.description: When a project Pro-wrapper equivalent exists, direct raw PrimeVue usage is also **FORBIDDEN**:
rules.message: Violation detected by PrimeVueComponentPriorityScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.message: Violation detected by PrimeVueComponentPriorityScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Use PrimeVue equivalent when available
rules.description: PrimeVue equivalent exists? → Use it.
rules.message: Violation detected by PrimeVueComponentPriorityScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Forbidden native interactive and data controls
rules.description: **NEVER use:** `<table>`, `<tr>`, `<td>`, `<th>`, `<thead>`, `<tbody>`, `<form>`, `<input>`, `<select>`, `<textarea>`, `<button>` (use PrimeVue `<Button>` instead).
rules.message: Violation detected by NativeControlScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Raw vue-echarts initialization forbidden
rules.description: **FORBIDDEN:** Raw `vue-echarts` initialization (`echarts.init(...)`, direct `VChart` mounting in business code).
rules.message: Violation detected by EchartsOwnershipScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, charts.

rules.title: Feedback must use approved abstraction
rules.description: **Feedback Channel (ABSOLUTE RULE):** NEVER use raw PrimeVue `Toast` instances in business code and NEVER use native `alert` / `confirm` for user feedback.
rules.message: Violation detected by FeedbackAbstractionScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Route feedback through internal abstraction
rules.description: You MUST route feedback through the internal abstraction (`@/components/ProToast` or the project's configured toast service APIs such as `window.$toast` / `window.$message`) to preserve queue policy, theme consistency, and cross-module UX behavior.
rules.message: Violation detected by FeedbackAbstractionScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Business dialogs must use approved wrapper
rules.description: **Dialogs (ARCHITECTURAL PRIORITY):** Prefer the internal dialog abstraction (`@/components/PrimeDialog` or equivalent architecture-approved wrapper / `useDialog`) over raw PrimeVue `Dialog` declarations when implementing business dialogs, so lifecycle orchestration, layout constraints, and close behaviors remain centralized.
rules.message: Violation detected by FeedbackAbstractionScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: PrimeVue customization must use PassThrough
rules.description: All visual customization of PrimeVue components MUST use the Pass-Through (`pt`) system.
rules.message: Violation detected by PassThroughConflictScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Deep selectors targeting PrimeVue internals forbidden
rules.description: `:deep(.p-*)` targeting PrimeVue internal classes is **FORBIDDEN** in business code.
rules.message: Violation detected by DeepSelectorExceptionScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Local PT must not duplicate or conflict with global preset
rules.description: If a global PT exists, your local `:pt` should only **ADD** classes, not **DUPLICATE** or **CONFLICT** with the global preset.
rules.authoritySection: 3.3 Global PT Presets — Check Before Writing
rules.message: Violation detected by PassThroughConflictScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: rem and em forbidden for source-authored sizing
rules.description: **SOURCE-AUTHORING BAN:** `rem` / `em` are forbidden for source-authored sizing and spacing utilities, style blocks, and arbitrary values.
rules.message: Violation detected by TokenLiteralScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Explicit structural units allowed only as fallback
rules.description: `px`, `%`, `vw`, `vh` are allowed when token classes cannot express the intent.
rules.message: Violation detected by TokenLiteralScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Shortcuts are a closed set
rules.description: Nonexistent shortcuts must never be invented.
rules.message: Violation detected by TokenLiteralScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: No raw hex or rem/em sizing in templates or styles
rules.description: **NEVER** use raw hex codes, RGB values, or `rem`/`em` sizing in templates or styles.
rules.message: Violation detected by TokenLiteralScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Layout dimensions must derive from size presets
rules.description: ALL layout dimensions, font sizes, spacing, and border radii MUST be derived from these presets via CSS variables. **Hardcoded pixel values for layout dimensions are FORBIDDEN.**
rules.message: Violation detected by TokenLiteralScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Theme presets must define light and dark modes
rules.description: `THEME_PRESETS` SHOULD use `CompleteThemePreset[]` and define both `light` and `dark` mode explicitly.
rules.message: Violation detected by ThemePresetValidator in registered scope IDs tokens, unocss, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Theme presets must include complete semantic families
rules.description: Every preset and mode MUST include complete semantic families: `primary`, `accent`, `success`, `warn`, `danger`, `info`, `help`, base scalar tokens, neutral tokens, and independent `sidebar` tokens.
rules.message: Violation detected by ThemePresetValidator in registered scope IDs tokens, unocss, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Preserve semantic tier in token contrast validation
rules.description: AI MUST preserve the intended semantic tier of each token instead of assuming a uniform contrast bar.
rules.message: Violation detected by ThemePresetValidator in registered scope IDs tokens, unocss, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Action and text pairs must meet 4.5 contrast
rules.description: Contract: these pairs MUST remain readable at `>= 4.5`
rules.message: Violation detected by ThemePresetValidator in registered scope IDs tokens, unocss, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Subtle pairs must meet 3.0 contrast
rules.description: Contract: these pairs MUST remain readable at `>= 3.0`
rules.message: Violation detected by ThemePresetValidator in registered scope IDs tokens, unocss, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Decorative light tokens must not be primary readable pairs
rules.description: Do NOT use `*-light` or `*-light-foreground` as the primary readable text/fill pair for CTAs, primary buttons, or body content.
rules.message: Violation detected by ThemePresetValidator in registered scope IDs tokens, unocss, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Layout dimensions scale by breakpoint
rules.description: **Layout dimensions** — PC expanded layout dimensions scale by breakpoint via `LAYOUT_SCALE_RATIOS`; Mobile/Tablet always use ratio = 1.
rules.authoritySection: Path B — Responsive Variables (device + breakpoint + preset)
rules.message: Violation detected by ResponsiveOwnershipScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Device store owns raw viewport state
rules.description: Device store owns raw device, viewport, breakpoint, orientation, pixel ratio, and resize lifecycle state.
rules.message: Violation detected by ResponsiveOwnershipScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Size engine owns CSS variable dimensions
rules.description: Size engine owns CSS variable dimensions, typography scaling, breakpoint scaling, pixel-ratio-aware sizing, and density presets.
rules.message: Violation detected by ResponsiveOwnershipScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Shell visibility must use runtime flags
rules.description: Use `v-if`/`v-show` with runtime flags, never responsive utility classes on shell structures.
rules.message: Violation detected by ResponsiveOwnershipScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Child components must not infer device behavior
rules.description: Child components may render from props, but MUST NOT infer mobile/tablet/drawer behavior locally.
rules.message: Violation detected by ResponsiveOwnershipScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Scrollable regions must use CScrollbar
rules.description: All scrollable regions MUST use `<CScrollbar>`. **STRICT PROHIBITION:** NEVER use `overflow-auto` or `overflow-scroll` on generic containers for primary page scrolling.
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: View root must be transparent
rules.description: <!-- ✅ REQUIRED: transparent root — Transparent Root Policy -->
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: No background or surface tokens on root wrapper
rules.description: <!-- ❌ FORBIDDEN: any bg-* / surface-* / material-* on root wrapper -->
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: col-fill forbidden as default root
rules.description: **FORBIDDEN AS DEFAULT ROOT:** NEVER use `col-fill` as the root wrapper for standard flowing pages where the parent layout handles scrolling.
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: col-fill permitted only when view owns scroll
rules.description: **PERMITTED ONLY WHEN VIEW TAKES OVER SCROLL:** Use `col-fill` at root ONLY if the view intentionally owns viewport-height + internal scrolling.
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: Structural visibility must not use media-query toggles
rules.description: Structural visibility (Sidebar/Top Menu/Drawer) MUST NOT rely on CSS media query visibility toggles.
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: Safe areas must consume centralized runtime variables
rules.description: All layout safe-area consumption must use centralized variables exposed by runtime styles:
rules.message: Violation detected by LayoutScrollScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, platform.

rules.title: Use semantic material tokens
rules.description: **REQUIRED:** You must use semantic material tokens: `material-solid`, `material-elevated`, `glass-panel`, `glass-capsule`.
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Glass forbidden inside tables, lists, scrollers, and nested glass
rules.description: **NEVER** use `glass-*` inside: `<ProTable>`, virtual lists, scrollable containers, or nested inside another `glass` element.
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Raw z-index utilities forbidden
rules.description: **FORBIDDEN — ALL raw z-index utilities (Tailwind scale AND arbitrary)**:
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Restructure stacking context instead of inventing z-index
rules.description: > If the required stacking order cannot be expressed with these 6 tokens, the solution is to restructure the DOM stacking context — NEVER to invent new z-index values.
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Light-mode canvas/card optical separation
rules.description: **Canvas vs card separation (mandatory):** The page canvas MUST read as a **slightly gray field**; elevated surfaces MUST read as **brighter / near-white** with **downward, dark-tinted shadow** (e.g.
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Dark-mode elevation via inset glow and semantic border
rules.description: **REQUIRED pattern:** Communicate elevation with **top-edge internal luminosity (inset highlight)** plus a **sharp semantic border** (`border border-solid border-border` or `border border-solid border-foreground/20`), not with “light-mode style” drop shadows alone.
rules.authoritySection: Dark Mode — Absorbed Shadow & Inset Glow
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Do not add borders everywhere
rules.description: Do not add borders everywhere.
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Shadows express elevation not style
rules.description: Use shadows to show elevation, not style.
rules.message: Violation detected by MaterialZIndexScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens, unocss.

rules.title: Profile defines replaceable visual expression
rules.description: Light mode should feel calm, not empty.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Profile replacement preserves platform invariants
rules.description: Dark mode should feel rich, not muddy.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Product language rejects generic dashboard decoration
rules.description: Liquid material: use restrained material transitions and luminous surfaces only where they clarify foreground/background separation.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Product language governs before material and motion choices
rules.description: Do not make CCD look like an Apple marketing page.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Product language enforces calm precision and inspectability
rules.description: Do not import Material UI or copy Google components.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Pointer enter/leave events forbidden in templates
rules.description: `@mouseenter`, `@mouseleave` (use CSS `:hover` gated by media query)
rules.message: Violation detected by AccessibilityReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Tooltip touch config uses focus event
rules.description: **Tooltip**: Use `{ event: 'focus' }` config on `v-tooltip` for touch devices
rules.message: Violation detected by AccessibilityReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Borders clarify grouping, selected, focus, and overlay boundaries
rules.description: Use borders to clarify grouping, selected state, focus, and overlay boundaries.
rules.message: Violation detected by AccessibilityReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: Theme switching must preserve visual-stage roots and form state
rules.description: Changing light/dark mode must not remount visual-stage roots or reset form input.
rules.message: Violation detected by AccessibilityReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, prime.

rules.title: ease-in-out forbidden for layout elements
rules.description: **FORBIDDEN:** `ease-in-out` for layout elements.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Use semantic easing curves
rules.description: **REQUIRED:** `ease-spring` for spatial transitions (drawers, layout shifts) and `ease-smooth` for opacity fades.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: GSAP eligibility limited to complex choreography
rules.description: Use GSAP for controlled Level 1 or Level 2 interaction and timeline work when CSS, Vue `<Transition>`, or local animate-lite is insufficient.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Prefer opacity and transform for motion
rules.description: Prefer opacity and transform over layout properties.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Do not use GSAP as default decoration
rules.description: Do not use GSAP as default page decoration.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Do not scatter will-change, transform-gpu, or large blur
rules.description: Do not scatter `will-change`, `transform-gpu`, or large blur across pages.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Motion communicates continuity not entertainment
rules.description: Motion: use motion to show continuity, not to entertain.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, app-router, vue-ui, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Region ownership is part of product language
rules.description: use status color only for real status;
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Decorative restraint required in product language
rules.description: avoid fake product metrics;
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Reject decorative patterns that obscure architecture
rules.description: Clarity: the primary task must be visible within three seconds.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: Product language prioritizes system structure
rules.description: Icons must support recognition or action affordance.
rules.message: Violation detected by ProductLanguageReviewer in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui, tokens.

rules.title: ProForm field wrappers may use native elements internally
rules.description: **Custom ProForm field wrappers** (`packages/vue-ui/src/ProForm/renderers/components/`) — may use native elements for fine-grained internal control.
rules.message: Violation detected by DeepSelectorExceptionScanner in registered scope IDs vue-ui.

rules.title: New deep-selector usage requires documented exception
rules.description: Any NEW `:deep(.p-*)` usage requires explicit architectural justification and MUST be added to this exception list.
rules.message: Violation detected by DeepSelectorExceptionScanner in registered scope IDs app-views, app-layouts, vue-ui.

rules.title: Preset colors must be full HEX source data
rules.description: Preset colors MUST remain valid full HEX values (`#RRGGBB`, no alpha, no shorthand).
rules.message: Violation detected by DeepSelectorExceptionScanner in registered scope IDs tokens.

rules.title: Warning alias restricted to adapter boundary
rules.description: Outside this adapter boundary, do not introduce `warning` as semantic family.
rules.message: Violation detected by DeepSelectorExceptionScanner in registered scope IDs prime.

rules.title: Layout renderers must consume finalized runtime state
rules.description: Layout renderers MUST be pure consumers of finalized runtime state.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-layouts, platform, hooks.

rules.title: Device store initialization must be singleton and idempotent
rules.description: Device store initialization MUST be singleton and idempotent; duplicate resize/orientation/visualViewport listeners are forbidden.
rules.message: Violation detected by MotionLifecycleScanner in registered scope IDs app-layouts, platform, hooks.
